title: Historical Banking Financial Statistics and Weekly Financial Statistics - Bank of Canada
content:
## Historical Banking Financial Statistics and Weekly Financial Statistics
Access banking and financial statistics from January 2012 to May 2018.
Starting with June 2018, the Banking and Financial Statistics (BFS) publication has been converted to a new format .
